description_long: This airplane features a sharply pointed nose and a sleek, angular fuselage with a dark reddish-brown, wood-like texture. The wings are swept back and positioned at a mid-fuselage level, each ending in a thin, metallic tip. Two large cylindrical jet engines are mounted above the wings, with their intakes and exhausts clearly visible. The tail section is angular, with a single vertical stabilizer and two outward-canted horizontal stabilizers, forming a distinctive V-tail configuration. The cockpit is located at the very front of the fuselage, enclosed with a small, rounded canopy, and the landing gear is not visibly extended, suggesting a possible retractable configuration.
description: A sleek, angular airplane with swept mid-mounted wings, twin top-mounted jet engines, and a pointed nose. The body is dark reddish-brown with a wood-like texture and a V-tail design.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the swept wings, twin cylindrical engines, and the pointed nose; the V-tail and overall angular shape are prominent.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pointed nose, cockpit canopy, and the symmetrical placement of the engines above the wings.
description_view_2: Bottom-up view mirroring the top-down, emphasizing the underwing structure and the alignment of the engines and wings.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the V-tail configuration, engine exhausts, and the angular rear fuselage.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, swept wings with slight dihedral angle and thin metallic wingtip extensions.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted above the wings.
attribute_tail_design: V-tail configuration with a single vertical stabilizer and two outward-canted horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a small rounded canopy.
